reviews.review_description: Gameplay is challenging enough to make me keep trying to improve my score. Graphics are simple but okay for this type of game. One of the best free games for Oculus Go.

developer_response.body:
Hi There.

Thank you for your feedback. 

We fully understand the specific feedback of graphics. The idea was to keep the game as light as possible and kids friendly. Your feedback is important to us. 

We will add more features in the next release :) 

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I like this game although my aim is horrible!  I won't be playing it much due to the fact that I simply don't live long.. by the time I figure out where to aim I’m dead!  LOL!  It would be so great to at least have the option of an “aiming mechanism” or ”directional beam” of some kind
